evals.prompt: 用 $sql-lineage-analysis 分析这段 SQL 的表级和字段级血缘：create table mart.user_orders as select u.id as user_id, u.name, count(o.id) as order_cnt from ods.users u left join ods.orders o on u.id = o.user_id where u.status = 'active' group by u.id, u.name;
evals.expected_output: 报告应识别目标表 mart.user_orders、上游表 ods.users 和 ods.orders，并列出 user_id/name/order_cnt 的字段来源、join/filter/group by 影响条件和置信度。

evals.prompt: 帮我看这个 CTE SQL 的字段血缘，越详细越好：with paid as (select user_id, sum(amount) amount from dwd.payments where status='paid' group by user_id) insert overwrite table ads.user_payment select u.user_id, coalesce(p.amount, 0) as paid_amount from dim.users u left join paid p on u.user_id=p.user_id;
evals.expected_output: 报告应展示 paid CTE 中间节点、ads.user_payment 目标表、dim.users 与 dwd.payments 上游，以及 paid_amount 经过 sum 和 coalesce 的转换链路。
